ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the participant for anonymity */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Status of consent for data usage */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the participant */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date of consent */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., general, specific activity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the activity */,
  "expected_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Physical intensity level of the activity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment required for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of experiments */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment set */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment set */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment set */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiments are conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sets_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant engaging in the activity */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being performed */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the participant during the activity */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the participant during the activity */,
  "z" INTEGER /* Z coordinate of the participant during the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded activity */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the participant during the activity */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin, participant) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic information */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education of the participant */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "has_children" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has children */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the participant has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set the experiment belongs to */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity data analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical test) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the analysis */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., activity data, experiment schedule) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
